title: Update tests for state store schema (semantic fields)
summary: Update state store tests to validate the 0.4.0 transaction event log and materialized state schema, including semantic memory fields.
acceptance_criteria: Tests validate journal events include tx_id, ticket_id, event_type, phase, step_id, actor, session_id.
Tests validate materialized state includes schema_version, active_tx, file_intents, integrity, last_applied_seq, semantic_summary, and user_intent.
Tests cover missing/invalid required fields and expected validation errors.

steps.description: Update event log tests for the new transaction event schema.
Update materialized state tests for semantic memory fields and integrity metadata.
Add validation/error-path tests for missing or malformed fields.

notes: Tests should align with the Phase 2 schema spec.
